amendment_target: Proposal for a regulation — Article 40 — paragraph 1 a (new)
body_md:
**Target:** Proposal for a regulation — Article 40 — paragraph 1 a (new)

## Text proposed by the Commission

*(no text)*

## Amendment of the European Parliament

The Commission shall issue standardisation requests covering all requirements of this Regulation, in accordance with Article 10 of Regulation EU (No)1025/2012 by… [two months after the date of entry into force of this Regulation]. When preparing standardisation request, the Commission shall consult the AI Office and the Advisory Forum;
parliament_text: The Commission shall issue standardisation requests covering all requirements of this Regulation, in accordance with Article 10 of Regulation EU (No)1025/2012 by… [two months after the date of entry into force of this Regulation]. When preparing standardisation request, the Commission shall consult the AI Office and the Advisory Forum;
